$comment: Vetted MLX model catalog. Each entry pins a HuggingFace repo + revision (commit SHA) — the 'vetting' is that we picked these models, tested them on our reference hardware, and pinned the exact repo state. New revisions = new app release. See design.md §3.8. The runtime is Python+mlx-lm/mlx-vlm (serve.py); VLMs are auto-detected from config.json so the catalog needs no isVisionModel flag.

models.name: Qwen 3.5 · 2B (6-bit MLX)
models.tagline: Recommended. Multimodal, sharp tool calling, fits 8GB comfortably.
